evidence: pullback_long remains the largest PnL engine at $2299.7 but owns the current -638.75 worst MAE. Broad structure pruning would block profitable pullbacks, and run_018 showed pullback TP/VWAP re-expansion can create severe drawdown and slow exposure.
name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
risk: Config-only proxies may block profitable weak-structure pullbacks; early-path and profile-aware state features are likely needed to avoid suppressing the core edge.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with weak structure distances, low or negative VWAP acceleration, no early MFE, and delayed recovery behavior.
validation_metric: Retain at least 90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and keeping total PnL/exposure flat or better.

evidence: All current bad-MAE rows are covered by the extended-VWAP near-miss family, but protected extended-VWAP winners contribute $720.8 with median MAE only -14.45 and median hold 1.18 minutes, so a blunt global VWAP cap is inappropriate.
name: Extended-VWAP Tail-State Split
risk: A crude global threshold would remove fast profitable extension trades and reduce risk-adjusted score despite improving apparent MAE.
trigger: Entries matching extended-VWAP rejection near misses with delayed early progress, weak support, or excessive wall distance.
validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -527, total PnL retention >=97%, and protected extended-VWAP winner PnL retention >=90%.
